.file-embed.background: rgb(65, 59, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(47, 40, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(59, 51, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(47, 40, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #4e4560 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#4e4560, color-mix(in srgb, #4e4560 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #4e4560 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#4e4560, color-mix(in srgb, #4e4560 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(59, 51, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(59, 51, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(111, 210, 194, 0.17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(47, 40, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(47, 40, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(59, 51, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(85, 84, 110) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(65, 59, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(65, 59, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(65, 59, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(47, 40, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
